title: Fireproof Boats
description: Adds warped and crimson boats which can be used on lava
body:
Mojang once again missed out on fleshing out their game. When adding fireproof wood, why not add fireproof boats made from said wood? This mod adds the missing warped and crimson boats which can be used on lava for safe travels around the lava lakes. There are of course also chested versions of the boats.

Need help or have questions come to [Discord](https://discord.gg/3G5qx4VaqW) ### Important Performance notice: To fix some Mojank where lava is rendered inside the boats, this mod by default changes the render type for lava turning it translucent. This can have a performance hit on low end systems but can be turned off in the client config file. [![Sponsor Time](https://jonn.dk/akliz_banner_fireboats.png)](https://www.akliz.net/lobstermods)
